python -c 
import urllib.request, urllib.parse, http.cookiejar

out = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.013/files/poleg-polsky_2016_nmda-dsgc-multiplicative.pdf'

# Use cookie jar to handle PMC redirect properly
jar = http.cookiejar.CookieJar()
opener = urllib.request.build_opener(urllib.request.HTTPCookieProcessor(jar))
opener.addheaders = [
    ('User-Agent', 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'),
    ('Accept', 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,application/pdf,*/*'),
    ('Accept-Language', 'en-US,en;q=0.9'),
]

# First visit the article page to get cookies
try:
    with opener.open('https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4795984/', timeout=30) as r:
        print('Article page status:', r.status)
        print('Cookies:', list(jar))
except Exception as e:
    print(f'Article page error: {e}')

# Now try the PDF
try:
    with opener.open('https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC4795984/pdf/nihms766337.pdf', timeout=60) as r:
        data = r.read()
        print(f'PDF response Content-Type: {r.headers.get("Content-Type","")}')
        print(f'Size: {len(data)}')
        print(f'Starts: {data[:8]}')
        if data[:4] == b'%PDF':
            with open(out, 'wb') as f:
                f.write(data)
            print('SUCCESS')
        else:
            print('Not PDF:', data[:300])
except Exception as e:
    print(f'PDF error: {e}')
